texto: Roger was like the Edgar Allen Poe of stupid people. He'd been making movies about women who were dead or dying, who didn't have much to say, for as long as his stringy hair had been ponytailed into a cliché.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alison Umminger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Roger was like the Edgar Allen Poe of stupid people. He'd been making movies about women who were…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humour, roger pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: Before my mom decided she was a lesbian, I thought lesbians were all these really nice, earthy, crunchy, let's smother you with our twenty extra pounds of lady love and fight the power people.
explicacao: Citação de Alison Umminger sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Before my mom decided she was a lesbian, I thought lesbians were all these really nice, earthy, c…” articula humor, contemporary, funny em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como funny e humor.
